title: Walking Through the Jungle Book

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
"what" on one switch 
"see" on the other
sections.middleText2: the book Walking Through the Jungle by Julie Lacome

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Use switches to complete repeated lines of Walking Through the Jungle. 
2. Begin reading the book. 
3. Model switch use on the first repeated line "Walking through the jungle (what) do you (see)."
4. Continue reading and pause so the switch user can fill in the gap.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to say the repeated line in the book
